headline: Why Jack Henry (JKHY) Is Down 6.2% After Mixed Signals On Margins, Buybacks And Guidance
summary: In recent weeks, Jack Henry & Associates reported record fiscal 2026 third‑quarter results, maintained its US$0.61 quarterly dividend, expanded its buyback authorization to 40,000,000 shares, and issued full‑year guidance that includes revenue of about US$2.52 billion and earnings per share of US$6.78–US$6.87. Despite these strong operational updates, management’s comments about upcoming margin pressure and slower second‑half revenue growth, alongside insider share purchases and enlarged...
